name: revit_create_opening_from_profile
description: Creates a host opening or shaft opening from a 2D profile on a wall, floor, beam, or between levels.

host_element_id.description: Wall, floor, or structural beam id for a host opening; omit for shaft opening

profile_points.description: Profile vertices in model coordinates defining the opening boundary

opening_type.description: Host-specific opening or vertical shaft between levels

notes: Profile.CreateOpening logic is separable; bypass ShaftHolePuncherForm mouse drawing.
